summary: Edit Quote Packing Type Feature Testing Complete. Backend API and Frontend UI both working correctly. Admin users can edit approved quotes and change packing type with dynamic packing charges recalculation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing approved quote Q/25-26/0103 with Wooden Box (8%) packing type
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Quote packing type feature fully functional. The Edit Quote modal (lines 3040-3100 in quotes.tsx) shows Packing Type section with 4 options: Standard (1%), Pallet (4%), Wooden Box (8%), Custom. The calculateEditedTotal function (lines 471-528) correctly calculates packing charges based on selected type. The saveEditedQuote function (lines 530-568) sends packing_type to backend API which stores it correctly.

tests: Update packing_type from wooden_box to pallet - PASS
Update to custom packing type (custom_5) - PASS
Verify packing_charges updated with total - PASS
Full edit quote flow simulation - PASS
Packing Type section visible in Edit Quote modal - PASS
Wooden Box (8%) radio option visible - PASS
Edit Quote button accessible from quote detail - PASS

initialization_logic.details: openEditQuote function (lines 432-452) correctly initializes editedPackingType and customPackingPercent from quote.packing_type, handling custom_X format

calculation_logic.details: calculateEditedTotal (lines 471-528) includes getPackingPercent helper that returns correct percentages: standard=1%, pallet=4%, wooden_box=8%, custom=custom percentage

save_logic.details: saveEditedQuote (lines 530-568) correctly formats packing_type for storage (custom_X for custom) and sends to backend
